name: Open Design: Use n8n as the Backend for an AI Brand Kit App
summary: Turn one URL into brand context, a design system, landing page HTML, and marketing assets through four n8n webhook routes.

requiredCredentials.name: Firecrawl account
requiredCredentials.purpose: Scrape the source URL and extract branding tokens.

requiredCredentials.name: Kimi K2.6 Header Auth
requiredCredentials.purpose: Generate brand copy, strategy, design.md, and landing page HTML.

requiredCredentials.name: Fal Header Auth
requiredCredentials.purpose: Generate hero, social, and Open Graph marketing images.

optionalCredentials.name: Postgres
optionalCredentials.purpose: Persist brand runs, design specs, landing pages, and asset packs.
